title: Migratory bird permits and registries - Canada.ca
content:
## Migratory bird permits and registries

## Migratory bird permits and registries
Permits, application forms, bird hunting, bird banding, other bird permits, service standards and registries.
- Buy your bird hunting permit
- Apply for a bird banding permit
- Abandoned nest registry

## Services and information
Buy a bird hunting permit, permit information.
Apply for a bird banding permit.

### Other migratory bird permits, forms and contact
Damage and danger, aviculture, taxidermy, airport, eiderdown, scientific, charity, contact information.

### Abandoned Nest Registry
Register one or multiple abandoned nests of species listed in Schedule 1 of the Migratory Birds Regulations, 2022.

### Service standards and performance targets
Timelines to issue permits, performance targets, results, service feedback.
- Environment and Climate Change Canada

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
